merchants_monocle.name: Merchant's Monocle
merchants_monocle.description: Increases Emerald sell value of duplicate mobs by 20% for the next 5 trades.

haste_potion.name: Haste Potion
haste_potion.description: Reduces standard roll cooldown by 30 minutes for the rest of the day.

token_finders_compass.name: Token Finder's Compass
token_finders_compass.description: 15% chance to receive a bonus second token when performing a Cleric trade for the next 24 hours.

focus_scroll.name: Focus Scroll
focus_scroll.description: Grants one extra 'Focus Roll' (ignoring common mobs) that doesn't count against your daily limit.
